title: WMCA: CRSTS annual report 2024 to 2025
body: "This document provides a progress update on the West Midlands Combined Authority’s (WMCA) City Region Sustainable Transport Settlements (CRSTS) programme between 2024 and 2025.  CRSTS provides funding for local transport networks to 8 city regions across England through 5-year settlements. See CRSTS: confirmed delivery plans and funding allocations for more information.  "
